name: Tomato Beef Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles in boiling water according to package directions, omitting salt; drain.
2. Brown beef with onion and garlic; cook until onion is translucent.
3. Add remaining 3 ingredients; stir to combine.
4. Bring to boil and cook only until tomatoes are heated through.
5. Stir in noodles; turn into a 2-quart baking dish.
6. Bake, uncovered, in preheated 350°F oven for 20 minutes.
